notableEvents.label: Joey Ortiz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Joey Ortiz grounds into a double play, third baseman Isaac Paredes to second baseman Braden Shewmake to first baseman Christian Walker. Andrew Vaughn out at 2nd. Joey Ortiz out at 1st.
